overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a dystopian urban street at night. The scene features a persistent overpass overhead, neon signage, burning trash, and futuristic architecture with a moody, hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated overpass with construction barriers

events.description: passing the burning trash pile in the middle of the street
approaching intersection and preparing to turn right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the overpass, navigating around the fire and construction barriers

entered.detail: white and red striped construction barriers lining the left side of the street
large concrete elevated highway or train track spanning overhead
large fire burning in a pile of trash or debris in the middle of the road
building with American flag visible on the upper facade

segments.scene_description: Walking forward under a massive concrete overpass in a dystopian cyberpunk city at night. Construction barriers line the left side while a burning trash fire illuminates the center of the road ahead. The environment is enclosed and sheltered, with artificial lighting from street lamps and the fire creating a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with neon commercial signs

events.description: turning right at the intersection onto a sidewalk with neon signage
black car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow safety vest walking toward and past the camera

entered.detail: large neon sign reading 'BRAIN-WASH' in purple and red letters on building facade
concrete sidewalk with scattered debris and paper
wooden utility pole with wires running along the street

segments.scene_description: Having turned right at the intersection, the scene transitions to a sidewalk lined with commercial buildings. A prominent 'BRAIN-WASH' neon sign glows red and purple on the left. The overpass continues overhead, and pedestrians walk along the sidewalk, including a person in a yellow vest who passes close to the camera. The ground surface changes from asphalt to concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching open city view with parking garage entrance

events.description: parking garage entrance comes into view on the left with distant city skyline visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk with the city skyline becoming visible ahead

entered.detail: underground parking garage entrance with red interior lighting on the left
distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible ahead
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk continues under the persistent overpass, with a parking garage entrance appearing on the left. The view ahead opens up to reveal a stunning futuristic city skyline with towering skyscrapers. Graffiti-covered walls line the left side, and the artificial lighting mixes with the distant glow of the city center. Sparse pedestrian traffic continues in the same direction as the camera moves forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic urban underpass into a wide vista of a futuristic city skyline. It begins by walking forward under a massive concrete overpass, passing construction barriers and a burning trash fire that casts a moody glow across the asphalt. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the environment shifts to a concrete sidewalk lined with commercial buildings and a vibrant red and purple BRAIN-WASH neon sign, while pedestrians in futuristic attire pass by. The scene then continues beneath the persistent overpass, gliding past graffiti-covered walls and a parking garage entrance. Finally, the enclosed space opens up to reveal a stunning skyline of towering skyscrapers glowing in the distance.
